titleStmt.title: SII 11.173: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 173. (B.K. No. 84 of 1927-28.) ĀLŪR, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE WALL OF THE NĀGĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and introduces the Daṇḍanāyaka Surigeya Hermmāḍiyarasa, son of Mādirāja, a ‘moon to the Karṇāṭa family’, as administering the Mahāgrahāra village Māḷadālūru by the favour of the king. His maternal uncle Mahāpradhāna Pasāyita, Surigeya Nāgarasa, son of Vāsudēva and grandson of Chāmarasa, granted a piece of land together with some gold, house-sites, etc., to the Mahājanas for the maintenance of a satra, a school for the study of Ṛigvēda, a tank and a water-shed, etc.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 48, Śōbhakṛit, Māgha, puṇṇami, Friday, lunar eclipse, vyatīpāta. The English equivalent is A.D. 1124, February 1, which was a day of lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarārambhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbha vē . jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitā
rṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnna tadeṁṣṭrāgra(ṁ) viśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . namastasmai varāhāya(ṁ) līleyā caratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇā
yatē . Ādiya satyāśraya kuḷakādaṁ satyāśrayanṛpaṁ jayasiṅghaṁ . bhēditaripu tannaṁdana nādaṁ traiḷōkyamallanāhavamalla . śivāyaḥ
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cālukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi vriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © . tatpādapadmōpajīvi © . Ene negarddā tribhuvanamallanarēśvarano ḷpasāyi
taṁ sakaḷajagajjananuta dēceyabhaṭṭara taneyaṁ vāśiṣṭakuḷaviyattaḷacaṁdraṁ svarṇnadharādharadhairyyaṁ nirṇniktaguṇaṁ viśuddhakīrtti
latāsaṁpūrṇnākhiḷadikcakraṁ karṇnāṭakuḷēndu mādirāja camūpa . mādige budhajana hṛdayāhlādige karppūracandanāgarukhuśri ṇāmō
dige nutasakaḷakaḷāvēdige samanoḷare sakaḷaviśvaṁbhareyoḷu . Ā manumārggana suta nuddā maguṇāṁbhōdi viśadakīrttivadhūṭīprēmaṁ budhakaḷpa
kujārāmaṁ permmāḍidaṇḍanāthalalāma . vṛtta . siri pūsamutti nekkasaradantire vāṇi lalāmarēkheyantire jayalakṣmi rakkevaṇiyantire pērura
do ḷmukhābjado ḷkhara meseyuttamirdda bhujadaṇḍadoḷintu negarttevetta nurbbareyoḷa gaṇyapuṇyanidhi permmarasaṁ budhakaḷpabhūha�ṁ . Ā daṇḍa
nāthatiḷakana sōdaramāvaṁ viśuddhaparahitacaritaṁ bhūdēvānvayavanajavanādityaṁ guṇa gaṇārṇnava nnāgarasaṁ . © svasti śrīmatri
bhuvanamalladēvara rāṇiyavāsanṁgaḷa rājādhyakṣamumaṁ cakravarttiya prasādōpalabdhiyiṁ śrīmajjanamējayadatti
ya mahāgrahāramumaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ surigeya hermmāḍiyarasa rāḷkeyalu . śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara pra
sādadiṁ śrīmatpasāyitaṁ surigeya nāgarasaru koḍaṁgeyya tevaralu Iṭṭageya dāriyiṁ vāsudēvayyadaṇḍanāya
kara satrageyyintaṁka polada mēreyiṁ paḍuva saḷḷatevara Īśvarayyana satrageyyiṁ baḍagalsaṁkamageṟeyiṁ koḷagada bāci
mayyana keyyiṁ pattire mūḍalintu nālkumeyya sīmeyindoḷage nūṟa hattu mattarkkeyya kōrabhāgamaṁ kuḍe paḍedu © svasti
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasampannarssa mastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta
rvviditavēdavēdārtthatatva ranēkasmritipurāṇatarkkabyākaraṇaviśeyapariṇata rssandhyō pāsananityakarmmajapahōmāgnihōtṛga ḷgaṁgā
snānapavitṛkṛtaśarīra raṣṭādaśadharmmaśāstrakuṣala rmmaṟegevarekāva rddrōhakuḷāntaka rssaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara rssaptasōma
saṁsthāvabhṛtāvagāhanapavitṛkṛtaśarīra rnnāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmajjanamējeyadattiya mahāgrahāraṁ śrīmanmā
ḷadālūra Ūroḍeya pramukha mahājanavinnūrvvaruṁ dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ surakṣita māgi parirakṣisuttamirppuda kaṇḍu . vṛtta . dharaṇī
kāntege māsavāḍiviṣayaṁ celvāgi māṇikyadābharaṇaṁbō lesadippu dāviśeyado ḷtāṁ māḷadālū rddharāmara rinnūrvvari gagrahāra madanoḷpiṁ
munne biṭṭa(ṁ) nnarēśvararatnaṁ janamējayākhya nenalinnēvaṇnipaṁ baṇnipa . kanda . varagāṁgōdaka dandadi naraḷiya maradandadiṁ pavitramena lbittarisidaṁ tadī
ya viprābharaṇa nnāgarasa natrigōtrapavitraṁ . Ene negarddālūrū ḷbudhajananidhi dānaprati grahādhyayanādhyāpanayaja
nayājanānvita nenisiye śivabhakta śāntimayyaṁ nnegardda . Osadu parāśaramunipaṁ gesedire muṁ puṭṭuvante vēdavyāsaṁ saśiviśadakīrttiśā
nta ṁgasuhṛdbaḷavijayi puṭṭidaṁ cāmarasa . Ā sarasīrhavaṁśasudhāsāgaraśīterōcigudeyamgeyda(ṁ) mbhāsuravenisuva kīrttiviḷā
saṁ śrīvāsudēva nurbbīdēva . Ātana vadhu damiyantige sītagarundhatige ratige ra(ṁ)mbhege bhūbhṛjjātege doreyenisida ḷavanītaḷa
do ḷmārakabbe vanitāratna . dhavaḷēkṣaṇeyene negarddā yuvatiya vamśāvatāramaṁ pēḷvaḍe bhūbhuvanaprasiddha nativēdavidaṁ karppā
ryaśaṇaṁge vasmatigeseda . Āvarggātmajaprayuktaṁ bhuvanastutyaguṇānurakta kamaḷōdbhavavaṁśabhava nnegaṟdō śrīdharaghai
sāsatanūja śiveyaśaṇaṁgiyaṁ pogaḷadarāru . girige girirājanandane paramēśvari puṭṭuvante kaśyapavaṁśābharaṇaṁge puṭṭida
ḷtoḷaparuṇādhare mārakabbe jasamesevinega . Ā ramaṇi mārakabbege vāri vāsudēvaṁga viḷādhāraṁ brahmānvayani
stāraṁ janiyisida nesevinaṁ nnāgadēva . Ā vipravarana kuḷavadhu bhūvadhuge nagādhirājananda nege vacōdēvige saridōre
cāuṇḍāmbike negartteyandhariyisidaḷu . vinayadoḷaṁ raṁjipa rūpinoḷaṁ saubhāgyaguṇadoḷaṁ dhātṛyo ḷinnenasuṁ surigeya
nāgarasana vadhu cāuṇḍakabbeyaṁ pōltapare . dayeyindaṁ dharmmadhātṛyo ḷabhinutamāgi sogayipantire nega(r)®da nayanābhirā
meyaṁ rūḍhiya nārddāvibudha jananuta nnāgarasaṁ . vṛtta . tanneya tiṇpinēḷge paḍigaṭṭaḷeyādudu maṁdarakke tannunnati mēruviṁge
maṇicūṇiyādudu tanna mikkadāna(ṁ) nnavakaḷpavallarige ponguḍiyādudu tanna kīrtti kaygannaḍiyādu durvvigene nāgarasannega
rddeṁ dharitṛyoḷu . © svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmāttyapadavīvirājamāna mānōnnataprabhumantrōtsāhaśa
ktitrayasaṁpanna vibudhaprasanna nnuḍidumattennaṁ viprakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa(ṁ) ṅkoṇḍe yara ga(ṁ)ṇḍa nahitaragaṇḍa nduṣṭadarppaṣṭa
madanivāraṇa(ṁ) mbhāvanagandhavāraṇaṁ śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhṛṁgaṁ parivāra cintāmaṇi mahāsēnādhipati patihi
tābharaṇaṁ śrīmadātrēyagōtrapavitraṁ vāsudēvaputraṁ sujanaiykamitraṁ bandhujana cintāmaṇi vivēkacūḍāma
ṇi mantṛmāṇikyannīticāṇākyaṁ satyarādhēyaṁ śaucāmjanēyaṁ manumārggacaritra(ṁ) nnāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī
matṛbhuvanamalladēva rantaḻpurādhyakṣaṁ tantrapāḷa radhiṣṭāyakaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ pasāyitaṁ surigeya nāgarasaru ©
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇavōnānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasa(ṁ) mpa nnarappa śrīmajja
namējayadattiya mahāgrahāraṁ śrīmanmāḷadālūra Ūroḍeyapramukhamahājanakke nūṟu ponna pādapūje
koṭṭu grāmada riṇamaṁ nnirābhāra(ṁ) mmāḍi © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 48 neya śōbhakṛtsaṁvatsa
rada māghada puṇnami sukravāradandu sōmagrahaṇamuṁ vyatīpātadandu koḍaṁgeyya tevaralu śaṁkharayyadaṇḍa
nāyakara sariyecageyyiṁ vāsudēvayyadaṇḍanāyakara satrageyyintaṁka Iṭṭageya polada mēreyiṁ pa
ttire paḍuva seḷḷatevara Īśvarayyana satrageyyiṁ baḍaga lsaṁkamageṟeyiṁ koḷagada bācimayyana ke(ṁ)yyi pa
ttire mūḍa lintu nālkumeyya sīmeyindoḷage nūṟahattumattarkkeyyuṁ Ūroḍeya pramukha mahājana
vinnūrvvaruṁ surigeya nāgarasara kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sarvvanamaśyavāgi sarvvabā
dhāparihāravāgi kādoḍuvaru Ā nūṟahattu mattarkeyyoḷage Iṭṭageya savasi gēriya
saru biṭṭa satrakke Innūrvvaruṁ dātārarāgi naḍeyisuvantāgi saṁkamageṟeyiṁ koḷagada bācimayyana keyyiṁ
pattira mūḍalbiṭṭa mattaru 50 Ā Ūralu rugvēdadabālasikṣeya khaṇḍikadalli svādhyāyaṁgeyva māṇiya
ra grāsakke biṭṭa mattaru 30 Alliya keṟeya Upabhōgakke mattaru 20 Alliya Aṟavaṁṭagege mattaru 10 A
ntu mattaru 110 baṭṭakeṟegēriya manayondu baṇaṁbe vondu rugvēdabālasikṣeya khaṇḍikakke ponge variśa kippaṇa vṛdhiya le
khkhade biṭṭa gadyā 20 ṟa vṛdhdhiya nālku ponnakhaṇḍikada Upādhyāyargge muṁcida hadikeya ljīvitamaṁ koṭṭu khaṇḍikama ninnūrvvaruṁ dātārarā
gi svadharmmadi nnaḍayisi sarvvābādhaparihāra vācandrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍeyisuvaru I dharmmakkanukūḷarāgi naḍeyisidavargge kurukṣētra pra
yāge Argghyatīrtthaṁgaḷo ḷsāyira kavileyaṁ paṁcaratnagaḷiṁ dalaṁkarisi caturvvēdapāragargge gōsahaśraṁ goṭṭa phalaṁ vāraṇāsiyo ḷsāyira liṁgapratiṣThe
phaḷa I dharmmakke pratikūlarāgi kiḍisidavarggā tīrtthadalā kavileyanā brāhmaṇaruma naḷida mahāpātakadōśamakkuṁ . © svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi miṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāgina ḻpārtthi
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ © śāṇḍilyagōtra kuḷakaraṇi caṭṭimayya naḷiyaṁ saṁkaṇana likhitaṁ cāvōjana kaṇḍa
Digital edition of SII 11.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
